relations: Facial expressions such as smiles, frowns, and raised eyebrows are components of body language used to express emotions
Gestures like waving or giving a thumbs up are part of body language for conveying messages without words
Posture, including how one stands or sits, is a crucial aspect of body language that can indicate confidence or discomfort
edges: Facial expressions such as smiles, frowns, and raised eyebrows are components of body language used to express emotions
Gestures like waving or giving a thumbs up are part of body language for conveying messages without words
Posture, including how one stands or sits, is a crucial aspect of body language that can indicate confidence or discomfort
